message:
fix(fcp-store): extract has_required_symbols to avoid truncating usize-to-u32 cast

Replace inline `obj.symbols.len() as u32 >= obj.meta.source_symbols`
with a has_required_symbols() helper that uses try_from and treats
counts above u32::MAX as sufficient. Add test for the overflow case
on 64-bit platforms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
